beliefs.subject: HazardModel — record_overflow() trained on pressure not OOM
beliefs.predicate: confuses proxy signal (swap_ratio) with causal signal (swap velocity)
evidence: signal_intelligence.rs: record_overflow() called unconditionally on VmPressureLevel::Critical
macOS dynamic swap: swap_ratio always ~1.0 when any swap is in use
hazard_model.rs: base_rate accumulates events on every kqueue Critical (fires at ~80% pressure normal)
graph: signal_intelligence.rs degree=325 (god node) — over-coupled, many paths through it
PENDING_HARDENING: no existing guard on false OOM training signals
beliefs.root_cause: Proxy signal confusion: macOS-specific dynamic swap semantics not accounted for in hazard training

beliefs.subject: ThermalManager.seconds_to_throttle: i32 with -1 sentinel
beliefs.predicate: uses magic sentinel value instead of Option<T> — Rust anti-pattern
evidence: types.rs: RuntimeMetrics::thermal_seconds_to_throttle: i32 with /// -1 = no throttle predicted
thermal_manager.rs: time_to_throttle() returns -1 in 3 branches as sentinel for None
main.rs: let mut thermal_seconds_to_throttle: i32 = -1 propagates sentinel to metrics
Graph: types.rs 64 degree (god file) — high fan-out amplifies sentinel misuse risk
beliefs.root_cause: Type safety gap: nullable integers bypassing Rust type system, hiding absence semantics

beliefs.subject: frozen_state — ghost PID accumulation after kqueue miss
beliefs.predicate: event-only cleanup without periodic reconciliation fallback
evidence: main.rs: no periodic reconciliation of frozen_state vs live process table before this fix
kqueue NOTE_EXIT not registered after daemon restart — gap window for ghost PIDs
frozen_ram_mb counts ghost PIDs as frozen memory → inflated pressure metrics
Graph: execute_actions.rs degree=84, safety.rs degree=59 — freeze/unfreeze paths diverge
Chromium manager: same pattern — display_turbo.turbo_frozen_pids also accumulates ghosts
beliefs.root_cause: Event-only state management: kqueue is necessary but not sufficient; periodic reconciliation needed as defensive fallback

beliefs.subject: Freeze/thaw lifecycle — missing pre-sleep unfreeze hook
beliefs.predicate: SIGSTOP'd processes block Jetsam target set during macOS sleep
evidence: main.rs: no sleep notification handling before this diff
IOKit kIOMessageSystemWillSleep fires ~30s before kernel suspend — window available
Frozen PIDs block Jetsam target set → more aggressive kills of widgets/extensions during sleep
display_turbo.rs: turbo_frozen_pids had no snapshot/clear API before this diff
Graph: sleep_notifier.rs in C109 (isolated community, 2 nodes) — minimal integration
beliefs.root_cause: Incomplete OS lifecycle integration: freeze logic covers run-time only, not sleep/wake transitions
